profile_backing.source: Pass81 dense-bool comparison output rejection diagnosed dense i64 comparison as dominated by per-lane int_cmp/i128 widening; Pass84 ledger kept i64 comparison specialization as a profile-backed residual target after dense gather/scatter.

prior_profile_rows.name: eval/lt_64k_i64_vec
prior_profile_rows.reason: dense i64 inputs already avoid Literal materialization, leaving comparison dispatch and widening as the visible lane cost

prior_profile_rows.name: eval/lt_scalar_64k_i64_vec
prior_profile_rows.reason: scalar comparison route shares the same generic int_cmp closure

focused_baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline lt_64k_i64 -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 20 --noplot

candidate.lever: direct Primitive-specific i64 comparisons without widening operands through i128
candidate.description: Temporarily added compare_i64 and routed dense same-shape, scalar, and broadcast i64 comparison paths through it instead of int_cmp(i128::from(lhs), i128::from(rhs)).

rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline lt_64k_i64 -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 20 --noplot

scalar_cross_worker_probe.baseline_command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline lt_scalar_64k_i64 -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 20 --noplot
scalar_cross_worker_probe.candidate_command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline lt_scalar_64k_i64 -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 20 --noplot
scalar_cross_worker_probe.interpretation: Cross-worker scalar probe was also slower, but only the same-worker lt_64k_i64 row is used for the keep/reject decision.

proof_test.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib comparison
proof_test.details: 20 comparison tests passed in candidate state, including dense_i64_compare_bit_identical_to_literal_path, dense_broadcast_compare_bit_identical_to_literal_path, scalar order, unsigned comparison, and complex error coverage.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate kept the existing row-major same-shape traversal, scalar tensor traversal, and BroadcastOdometer traversal order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Integer comparison equal-value behavior was primitive-identical for Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, and Ge; there is no stable sort or tie index.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No floating-point path changed; f64/f32 comparison routes remained on the existing float comparator.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: comparison evaluation consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: Unsupported dtype and complex comparison errors stayed on the existing fallback paths.

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib comparison

alien_source.primitive_family: typed lane execution over dense SoA storage
alien_source.applied_slice: Tried replacing the generic widened integer comparison lane with primitive-specific i64 comparisons over dense i64 buffers.

next_primitive.target: strided non-contiguous dense gather, pending the next focused profile
next_primitive.reason: The direct i64 comparison micro-lever regressed the same-worker benchmark. Do not repeat this family; pivot to the next profile-backed structural primitive in the dense indexing pipeline, or reprofile and choose a higher row if the bottleneck shifted.
proof_obligations: gather fill/drop/clip and repeated-index semantics unchanged
floating-point element bits copied without arithmetic
next_primitive.fallback_trigger: Reject and restore source if same-worker RCH Criterion mean does not beat the retained baseline with Score>=2.0.
